body:
### Why this matters

Google Cloud Functions Python 3.10 has a published deprecation date of October 4, 2026 and decommission date of April 4, 2027. Functions should be migrated before runtime lifecycle restrictions affect safe redeployment.

### What this control checks

This control finds Google Cloud Functions using the `python310` runtime. Upgrade to `python312` or newer after dependency and packaging validation.

### Operational note

Python runtime upgrades can require package rebuilds, dependency updates, and validation of handlers, CloudEvents payloads, native wheels, and build behavior.
name: Ensure Google Cloud Functions are not using Python 3.10
description: Google Cloud Functions using Python 3.10 before deprecation
timedControlSummary: Google Cloud Functions on Python 3.10 should be migrated before the October 4, 2026 deprecation date.
timedControlDisruptionRisk: Late runtime migrations can block safe redeployments and require urgent dependency changes.
remediationDescription:
## Google Cloud remediation

> **Runtime migration program (recommended):** migrate functions by application or runtime family. This lets teams validate dependencies, buildpacks, triggers, IAM, and observability consistently.

### Google Cloud Console

1. Open **Cloud Functions** and select the affected function.
2. Review triggers, environment variables, service account, ingress, and build settings.
3. Update the runtime to `python312` or newer.
4. Redeploy through your normal release process and validate logs, metrics, and trigger delivery.

### gcloud CLI

Inspect the current runtime:

```bash
gcloud functions describe <function-name> \
  --region <region> \
  --format='value(runtime,status)'
```

Redeploy with a supported runtime, keeping your existing trigger and source flags:

```bash
gcloud functions deploy <function-name> \
  --region <region> \
  --runtime python312
```

### References

- https://cloud.google.com/functions/docs/runtime-support
- https://cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud/reference/functions/deploy

timedControlRules.summary: Google Cloud Functions on Python 3.10 should be migrated before the October 4, 2026 deprecation date.
timedControlRules.disruptionRisk: Late runtime migrations can block safe redeployments and require urgent dependency changes.
timedControlRules.recommendedTarget: Set runtime to python312 or newer after compatibility testing.
